text: It was a very interesting course , however it was biased toward Spanish history with the inclusions . I was really more interested in what I thought the course was supposed to be about anyway , Medieval Manuscripts . I had a terrible time deciphering the lecturer ' s English and , because I ' m not interested in a course certificate , the course projects were a waste of my time , though I can see that they could be fun and add to the enjoyment of the course .
